name: Gemma 24x30 Garage Plan - A Spacious Garage Designed for Style, Storage & Everyday Functionality
open_features: Three spacious bays accommodate vehicles, equipment, outdoor gear, or workshop setups with ease.
Clean framing, clear structural lines, and straightforward assembly make this plan accessible for beginners and pros alike.
Wide wood-grain doors with upper glass panels create a warm, handcrafted look while offering excellent access for vehicles and tools.
Blue horizontal siding, crisp white trim, black shingle wainscoting, and warm wood doors blend into a polished yet inviting aesthetic.
description_summary: Kickstart your next property upgrade with the Gemma Garage Plan - a 24x30 multi-bay garage crafted for efficiency, clean design, and versatile use. With its classic gable roof, bold blue siding, rich wood carriage-style garage doors, and extended covered parking bay, the Gemma delivers standout visual appeal with practical functionality for homeowners, hobbyists, and vehicle enthusiasts. Whether you're building a home workshop, a vehicle storage hub, a hobby studio, or a well-organized utilit...
